title: Add active reference dataset assignment to Score
description:
## Summary
Add a score-owned pointer such as `referenceDataSetId` so each score can name its active deterministic regression dataset.

## Deliverables
- Make the score-owned reference dataset pointer the authoritative active reference.
- Expose it through client models, dashboard utilities, and MCP/API surfaces as needed.
- Keep active-reference selection on `Score`, not on `DataSet`.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: add score-owned active reference dataset pointer (referenceDataSetId) in schema and wire through runtime/API surfaces used by dashboard and MCP.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented active reference dataset pointer on Score.

Changes:
- Added `referenceDataSetId` + `referenceDataSet` relation to `Score` schema in `dashboard/amplify/data/resource.ts`.
- Extended dashboard client Score create/update typings and update mutation selection in `dashboard/utils/amplify-client.ts`.
- Extended Python Score model (`plexus/dashboard/api/models/score.py`) with `referenceDataSetId` in constructor/fields/from_dict.
- Exposed `referenceDataSetId` in MCP score surfaces (`MCP/tools/score/scores.py`, `MCP/tools/score/management.py`).

Validation:
- `python -m py_compile` passed for modified Python files.
- Editable install refreshed (`pip install -e .`).
- `plexus evaluate feedback --help` confirms current CLI options are present (`--max-samples`, `--sample-seed`, `--baseline`).
